name: Semgrep (uvx)
description: Run Semgrep static analysis through MCP. Scan code for security vulnerabilities with 5,000+ built-in rules, write and run custom rules, inspect ASTs, and fetch findings from the Semgrep AppSec Platform.

inputs.label: Semgrep App Token
inputs.description: Optional. Connects the server to the Semgrep AppSec Platform to enable cloud features such as fetching findings (semgrep_findings). Leave empty to run local scans only.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in at https://semgrep.dev
2. Go to Settings > Tokens
3. Create a new token (API scope)
4. Copy it and paste here

auth.instructions: No token is required for local scanning. Provide an optional SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN to enable Semgrep AppSec Platform features. Create one at https://semgrep.dev/orgs/-/settings/tokens
